things.name: Kaieteur Falls
things.description: World's most powerful waterfall - five times higher than Niagara with untouched rainforest

things.name: St George's Cathedral
things.description: World's tallest wooden church at 43m - a Victorian colonial masterpiece

things.name: Demerara River Ferry & Market
things.description: Cross the Demerara River by ferry to the Stabroek market with its distinctive clock tower

things.name: Georgetown Seawall
things.description: 8-mile sea wall below sea level with evening promenaders

things.name: Botanical Gardens
things.description: 75-hectare gardens with manatees, Victoria amazonica water lilies and tame deer

things.name: Walter Roth Museum of Anthropology
things.description: Amerindian culture from Guyana's indigenous peoples

things.name: Iwokrama Rainforest Lodge
things.description: Pristine Amazon rainforest birding with harpy eagles and giant river otters

things.name: National Museum of Guyana
things.description: History of the Guyanese people from indigenous times through Dutch, French and British colonial era

things.name: Rupununi Savanna Safari
things.description: Giant anteaters, giant otters and jaguar spotting in the wild southern grasslands

things.name: Pepperpot Stew
things.description: Guyana's national dish - cassareep-stewed meat slow-cooked indefinitely and never quite finished
